coupons.name: 20% Off New Plumbing Customers
coupons.description: New customers get 20% off their first plumbing service booking.

coupons.name: 15% Off First Plumbing Repair
coupons.description: Save 15% on your first qualifying plumbing repair, including sink and drain issues.

coupons.name: $25 Off Any Plumbing Service
coupons.description: Get $25 off any single plumbing service when your total before tax is at least $120.

coupons.name: 10% Off 3+ Handyman Tasks
coupons.description: Automatically save 10% when you book three or more eligible small handyman tasks in one visit.

coupons.name: 15% Off Electricians (Under $90/hr)
coupons.description: Save 15% on hourly electrician services priced at $90/hour or less.

coupons.name: $30 Off Interior Room Painting
coupons.description: Take $30 off any interior room painting quote over $250.

coupons.name: 15% Off for New Homeowners
coupons.description: New homeowners get 15% off their first booking on select categories.

coupons.name: Weekday Plumbing 10% Off
coupons.description: Save 10% on plumbing appointments scheduled Monday–Thursday.

coupons.name: 15% Off Morning Handyman Visits
coupons.description: Get 15% off handyman bookings that start before 12:00 PM.

coupons.name: 20% Off Door Repair Visit
coupons.description: Save 20% on eligible door repair services booked online.

coupons.name: Spring Plumbing 25% Off (Expired)
coupons.description: A past seasonal offer for 25% off plumbing work. No longer valid.

coupons.name: $5 Courtesy Credit
coupons.description: One-time $5 courtesy credit, often applied by support for billing issues.

coupons.name: $50 Loyalty Reward
coupons.description: Loyal customers can redeem a $50 discount on any service category.

handyman_tasks.name: Furniture Assembly
handyman_tasks.description: Assemble flat-pack furniture such as chairs, tables, dressers, or TV stands.

handyman_tasks.name: Hanging Pictures/Frames
handyman_tasks.description: Hang pictures, mirrors, or artwork securely on drywall or plaster.

handyman_tasks.name: Shelf Installation
handyman_tasks.description: Install wall-mounted shelves, including leveling and anchoring.

handyman_tasks.name: TV Mounting
handyman_tasks.description: Mount a flat-screen TV to the wall and hide basic cables.

handyman_tasks.name: Curtain Rod Installation
handyman_tasks.description: Install or replace curtain rods and hang curtains.

handyman_tasks.name: Door Handle/Lock Repair
handyman_tasks.description: Fix or replace interior door handles, latches, and simple locks.

handyman_tasks.name: Small Drywall Patch
handyman_tasks.description: Patch and sand small holes or dents in drywall (up to 1 sq ft).

handyman_tasks.name: Faucet Replacement (Non-Plumbing Emergency)
handyman_tasks.description: Replace an existing faucet with a customer-supplied fixture (non-emergency).

handyman_tasks.name: Recaulk Bath or Kitchen
handyman_tasks.description: Remove old caulk and apply new caulk around a tub, shower, or countertop.

handyman_tasks.name: Furniture Move/Rearrange (Same Room)
handyman_tasks.description: Move and reposition furniture within a single room.

handyman_tasks.name: Storm Door Adjustment
handyman_tasks.description: Adjust hinges, closer, and latch on an existing storm or screen door.

handyman_tasks.name: Minor Tile Repair (1–3 tiles)
handyman_tasks.description: Replace or reset a few loose or cracked tiles (materials not included).

service_categories.name: Plumbing
service_categories.description: Licensed local plumbers for leaks, clogs, fixture installs, and emergency repairs.

service_categories.name: Handyman Services
service_categories.description: General home repairs, small installs, and punch‑list tasks around the house.

service_categories.name: Electrical
service_categories.description: Certified electricians for outlets, lighting, panel work, and safety inspections.

service_categories.name: Painting
service_categories.description: Interior and exterior painting, touch‑ups, and full room refreshes.

service_categories.name: General Home Repairs
service_categories.description: Miscellaneous repairs and maintenance not covered by a single trade category.

providers.name: Budget Flow Plumbing
providers.description: Affordable neighborhood plumber focused on common repairs like sink leaks, slow drains, and toilet issues. Ideal for non-emergency evening appointments.

providers.name: Townline Plumbing & Drain
providers.description: Small local crew specializing in drain clogs and fixture repairs with transparent hourly pricing.

providers.name: Neighborhood Pipe Pros
providers.description: Full-service plumbing company available for same-day appointments and complex repairs.

providers.name: Elite 24/7 Plumbing
providers.description: Premium emergency plumbing team with rapid response for urgent whole-home issues.

providers.name: Suburb Side Plumbing Co.
providers.description: Suburban plumbing company offering scheduled maintenance and installations.

providers.name: Quick Fix Handyman
providers.description: Versatile handyman focusing on small jobs that can be completed in a single morning visit.

providers.name: Door & Trim Handyman Services
providers.description: Specialist in interior and exterior door repairs, including sticking doors and hardware replacement.

providers.name: All-Round Home Handyman
providers.description: General home repair expert for punch-list items and small projects throughout the house.

providers.name: Bright Spark Electric
providers.description: Licensed electrician offering hourly troubleshooting and installation of common fixtures.

providers.name: Safe Current Electrical
providers.description: Safety-focused electrical contractor for panel work and home electrical upgrades.

providers.name: Value Wire Electric
providers.description: Budget-friendly electrician for light fixtures and minor wiring jobs.

providers.name: Fresh Coats Painting
providers.description: Interior painting specialists providing detailed prep work and neat finishes.

providers.name: Room Refresh Painters
providers.description: Ideal for small projects like repainting a bedroom or living room with flexible scheduling.

providers.name: HomeCare Repair Services
providers.description: Mixed-skill repair team for miscellaneous home issues that don't fit into a single trade.

providers.name: Downtown Door & Glass Repair
providers.description: Door-focused repair company handling sticking doors, hardware updates, and light glass work.

standard_services.name: Sink Repair
standard_services.description: Diagnosis and repair of leaks, drips, or loose connections on kitchen or bathroom sinks. Parts not included.

standard_services.name: Drain Clog Clearing
standard_services.description: Clearing of a single slow or clogged drain using standard snaking equipment (no main line).

standard_services.name: Toilet Repair
standard_services.description: Repair running, constantly filling, or weak-flushing toilets. Includes basic flapper and fill valve adjustments.

standard_services.name: Water Heater Diagnostic
standard_services.description: Inspection and diagnostic service for gas or electric water heaters that are leaking or not heating properly.

standard_services.name: Handyman Multi-Task Visit
standard_services.description: Bundle of up to three small handyman tasks (such as furniture assembly, picture hanging, shelf installation) in a single visit.

standard_services.name: Door Repair – 1 Hour Visit
standard_services.description: One-hour visit for common door issues such as sticking, sagging, loose hinges, or latch misalignment.

standard_services.name: Furniture Assembly Visit
standard_services.description: Assembly of up to three flat-pack furniture items such as chairs, tables, or small dressers.

standard_services.name: Picture Hanging – Small Job
standard_services.description: Hanging up to ten pictures, frames, or artwork pieces on drywall or plaster walls.

standard_services.name: Electrical Troubleshooting (Hourly)
standard_services.description: Hourly electrical diagnostic service for tripping breakers, dead outlets, or flickering lights.

standard_services.name: Light Fixture Installation
standard_services.description: Installation or replacement of a standard ceiling or wall light fixture, customer-provided.

standard_services.name: Interior Room Painting
standard_services.description: Full interior painting of a single room up to 150 sq ft, including basic wall prep and two coats of paint.

standard_services.name: Exterior Door Painting
standard_services.description: Prep and repaint of a single exterior door, including sanding, priming, and finish coat.

standard_services.name: Basic Home Repair Visit
standard_services.description: General home repair visit for miscellaneous small issues such as loose trim, minor caulking, or hardware adjustments.

standard_services.name: Follow-Up Inspection Visit
standard_services.description: Short follow-up visit to inspect previous repair work or address minor touch-ups.

service_options.name: Standard Sink Repair Visit
service_options.description: Up to 90 minutes on-site to diagnose and repair a single sink leak or drip.

service_options.name: Extended Leak Diagnostics
service_options.description: Up to 2.5 hours for complex sink issues affecting multiple fixtures or hard-to-access piping.

service_options.name: Basic Drain Clog Clearing
service_options.description: Standard visit to clear a single clogged sink, tub, or shower drain using snaking equipment.

service_options.name: Standard Toilet Repair Visit
service_options.description: Service call to repair a single toilet that is running, leaking, or not flushing properly.

service_options.name: Water Heater Diagnostic Visit
service_options.description: Comprehensive diagnostic of one residential water heater, including visual inspection and testing.

service_options.name: 2-Hour Visit (Up to 3 Small Tasks)
service_options.description: Ideal for three small tasks such as furniture assembly, picture hanging, and shelf installation.

service_options.name: 3-Hour Visit (Up to 5 Small Tasks)
service_options.description: Extended visit for larger punch lists that include up to five small handyman tasks.

service_options.name: Standard 1-Hour Door Repair
service_options.description: One-hour visit for a single door with issues like sticking, sagging, or latch misalignment.

service_options.name: Extended 2-Hour Door Repair
service_options.description: Two-hour visit for more involved door work or multiple doors in the same home.

service_options.name: Standard Furniture Assembly Visit
service_options.description: Up to two hours to assemble up to three flat-pack furniture pieces.

service_options.name: Picture Hanging Visit
service_options.description: Visit to hang up to ten pictures, frames, or mirrors on interior walls.

service_options.name: First Hour of Troubleshooting
service_options.description: Initial one-hour diagnostic visit for common electrical issues.

service_options.name: Single Light Fixture Installation
service_options.description: Install or replace one standard ceiling or wall fixture in an existing junction box.

service_options.name: Standard Room Painting (Up to 150 sq ft)
service_options.description: Two coats on walls of a single room up to 150 sq ft, basic prep included.

service_options.name: Premium Room Painting (Up to 250 sq ft)
service_options.description: Includes extra prep, minor patching, and trim touch-up for a larger room.

service_options.name: Single Exterior Door Painting
service_options.description: Prep and repaint of one exterior door, including sanding, priming, and finish coat.

service_options.name: Basic Home Repair Hourly Visit
service_options.description: One-hour visit for miscellaneous small home repairs and adjustments.

service_options.name: Short Follow-Up Inspection
service_options.description: Up to one hour to inspect recent repair work or handle minor touch-ups.

applied_coupons.description: 10% off booking with three or more handyman tasks.
15% off handyman visit starting before 12:00 PM.
15% off hourly electrician services priced at $90/hour or less.
$5 courtesy credit applied by support for a past plumbing booking.

bookings.title: Sink Repair - Kitchen Leak
bookings.problem_description: Kitchen sink faucet dripping continuously and small puddle under the cabinet.

bookings.title: Bathroom Drain Clog Clearing
bookings.problem_description: Upstairs bathroom sink draining very slowly; likely hair clog in the trap.

bookings.title: Shower Drain Clog
bookings.problem_description: Master shower backs up after a few minutes of use; water pooling at feet.

bookings.title: Handyman - 3 Task Bundle
bookings.problem_description: Assemble a dresser, hang several photos in the hallway, and install a small floating shelf.

bookings.title: Handyman - Door and Furniture Adjustments
bookings.problem_description: Adjust sticky storm door and move a few pieces of furniture within the living room.

bookings.title: Handyman - 3 Small Tasks
bookings.problem_description: Plan to assemble a console table, hang artwork in the dining room, and add a small shelf in the entry.

bookings.title: Handyman - TV Mounting
bookings.problem_description: Mount a 55-inch TV on the living room wall and route cables neatly along the wall surface.

bookings.title: Handyman - Curtain Rod & Pictures
bookings.problem_description: Install two curtain rods in the bedroom and hang a set of framed photos in the hallway.

bookings.title: Door Repair - Sticking Front Door
bookings.problem_description: Front entry door sticks at the top corner and is difficult to latch.

bookings.title: Electrical Troubleshooting - Dead Outlets
bookings.problem_description: Several kitchen counter outlets stopped working after a breaker tripped.

bookings.title: Light Fixture Installation - Dining Room
bookings.problem_description: Replace existing dining room light with a new chandelier (customer supplied).

bookings.title: Interior Painting - Living Room (150 sq ft)
bookings.problem_description: Repaint living room walls in a light gray; room is approximately 150 square feet.

bookings.title: Interior Painting - Bedroom
bookings.problem_description: Repaint small bedroom with one accent wall and fresh white on the remaining walls.

bookings.title: Basic Home Repair Visit
bookings.problem_description: Tighten loose handrail, re-caulk around kitchen sink, and adjust a noisy bathroom fan cover.
